programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The World Crime Prevention Devices Association has developed the "killer safe" that sent many safe crackers to their graves. But Lupin takes the challenge to steal what it guards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin crashes crime boss Markane's masquerade party, but the party was just a ruse to entrap Lupin. Lupin gets hung by rope in the dark and is made the target of Markane's murder game in ten rounds, of which players have to hit the target.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: La manada más salvaje
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Diana se perfilan como las más odiadas del grupo, mientras que el nuevo ex le quita el lugar a Christian. Yurgenis avanza con Brandon y una fiesta salvaje rompe con todo lo que ellos creían de sí mismos.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: De la broma a la guerra

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes on an airplane and visits with the pilot and flight attendant, who show him around the plane to help children feel more familiar when traveling by air.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches former Pittsburgh Steeler wide receiver Lynn Swann practice ballet with a dance company. He tells Mister Rogers how dancing has helped him play football. Lynn Swann also visits the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday announces the winner of the “Draw The Neighborhood” contest and awards a very unusual prize to everyone -- a rainbow. Mister Rogers shows a video of how real gold is processed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a ventriloquist's dummy he played with as a child. Bob Dog falls and is hurt. They take him to the hospital. King, Friday, prohibits play. Mister Rogers says play is important in learning to manage feelings.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: When King Friday outlaws play, Lady Elaine moves her Museum Go-Round to an entirely new location. She finds herself in a place where play is welcome—a play park, where she meets Barbara Russell.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses scissors and talks about safety. Lady Elaine tells Officer Clemmons she won't return to the Neighborhood until King Friday changes his rule against play. Lou Schreiber, Johnny Costa, and Joe Negri play music together.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave. Lady Elaine won't return until the no-play rule is changed. King Friday removes the ban when he realizes his fanfare cannot be played.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers walks on stilts and talks about how long it took him to learn to walk on them. Bob Dog persuades Lady Elaine Fairchilde to return to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mister Rogers talks about different ways of playing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how a player piano works. Corney's latest shipment of rocking chairs has been made with half pretzel parts. Mister Rogers talks about how important it is to do things well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a doll factory. Corney makes King Friday dolls. Lady Elaine is jealous. Mr. McFeely show Mister Rogers a swimming doll. Mister Rogers says he will take us to where he swims.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to visit ice skating star Peggy Fleming, who is practicing for an ice show. They talk about how doing anything well takes a lot of practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make blankets. Lady Elaine convinces Corney to manufacture only rocking chairs. Mister Rogers talks about why children are sometimes punished.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits his friend Adelia Moore to see how she makes stuffed animals for her children. In the Neighborhood of Make- Believe, the Neighbors are making presents for Ana Platypus' birthday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how spoons are made. King Friday demands that Lady Aberlin and Robert Troll create a mountain beside the castle. Mary Alice Sherred makes music with spoons.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a juniper tree. Everyone is covering the Eiffel Tower with trees. Queen Sara falls off the tower and is taken to an emergency room. Mister Rogers shows an emergency room.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a small kitten that belongs to Chuck Aber. Mister Rogers shows a film about seat belts. King Friday wants to see a mountain opera.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a popcorn popper. He is introduced to Ray Detwiler who plays rare horns. Chef Brockett gives a popcorn ball to King Friday who declares there be popcorn in the opera.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make towels. The Neighborhood of Make-Believe is hosting the Make-Believe Olympic Games. Lady Elaine will only agree to play if she is guaranteed to win the games.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Cobweb

programme.title: The Crazies
programme.desc: A lawman (Timothy Olyphant) and his wife (Radha Mitchell) and two companions fight to make it out of town alive after an unknown toxin turns ordinary citizens into bloodthirsty lunatics.

programme.title: Mom and Dad

programme.title: Pandorum

programme.title: UHF

programme.title: Carrie (2002)

programme.desc: Don Cangrejo y Bob Esponja ocultan el cuerpo de un inspector de sanidad; Bob Esponja y Patricio tiran su nueva TV y conservan la caja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Patricio le muestran a Calamardo una ó dos cosas acerca de la nieve en `The Snowball Effect', y en `One Krab's Trash', el Sr Krabs accidentalmente vende un sombrero valioso a Bob Esponja.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: El estrellato se sube a la cabeza de Bob Esponja después de que él aparece en el comercial de bajo presupuesto del Crustáceo Cascarudo; Calamardo se empobrece.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja tiene pesadillas tras haber visto una película de terror: cree que los robots han tomado el control del mundo. Bob Esponja y Patricio han encontrado una pequeña almeja y deciden adoptarla y protegerla hasta que sea mayor.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Don Cangrejo sabiamente elige a Bob Esponja y a Patricio para decorar su sala de estar; luego, aprenden acerca de ser un excelente empleado.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja pasa una noche en la cárcel después de ser detenido por la policía tratando de entrar a su casa, después de que accidentalmente se queda por fuera durante una fiesta.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Cuando Bob Esponja y Patricio venden barras de chocolate de puerta en puerta, terminan comprando más de lo que venden. Superhéroes los visitan.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Patrick se une a Bob Esponja en su clase de navegación, pero no resulta nada tranquila; el Sr. Krabs celebra un momento histórico en su negocio.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Annoying Miss Popularity, Miriam, is having a pool party and the girls want to go. But being around water is risky, especially when Zane tosses Cleo into the pool. Lewis is the only one around to help so he finds out their secret.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Rikki, Emma and Cleo discover that sea turtles are being captured by fishing nets. When Rikki and Emma attempt to rescue the turtles by cutting the nets, it causes the fisherman to think that there is a rogue shark roaming their ocean.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Emma decides that she is not going to have her annual sleepover party due to what has happened to them. But Rikki and Cleo try to convince her otherwise. Meanwhile, Lewis conducts experiments on the girls.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Cleo's sister Kim finds her diary and thinks that Cleo and her friends are 'evil mermaids' and she plans to tell everyone. Meanwhile, Lewis goes to Mako Island to find out more about what happened to the girls.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Rikki gains an admirer in Emma’s younger brother Elliot when she saves him from drowning. She lets him down hard causing him to run away and hide in the fernery. The girls find him just as the watering system is about to start…

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: The effects of the full moon turns Emma into a carefree, wild mermaid. At her father’s birthday party she’s the opposite to her usual, organised self. Can the other girls stop her before all is revealed?

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: A charismatic newcomer, Dr. Denman, tempts Lewis with the promise of scientific fame and fortune. Will he abandon his friends and risk their secret, all in the name of science?

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Rikki uses her abilities as a mermaid to earn some quick cash, but when she accidentally becomes involved in a fish smuggling operation, she sets out to get her revenge.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Rikki enters a short film contest on the theme of 'Heroes' and decides to capture some nice underwater footage with her 'abilities'. Meanwhile, Emma is interviewing her mum and Zane and Lewis are planning to rennact Dr. Bennet's windsurfing record.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Byron asks Emma for help with training the school's swimming team and Emma has some trouble deciding whether or not to help out in her current situation. Meanwhile, Lewis continues to experiment on the girls, which annoys Rikki.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Rikki sets Cleo up at a karaoke contest as a joke, where she is humiliated due to her lack of talent. However, her singing ability undergoes a dramatic change when, in spite of the girls' precautions, she is hypnotized by the full moon.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: When the mysterious, old Miss Chatham's boat and home is declared unseaworthy, Emma invites her over to stay. Zane gets trapped on the sinking boat and Emma tries to save him but he sees a tail.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Cleo's 16th birthday is approaching and she thinks that her father is going to throw another embarrasing birthday party. Meanwhile, Zane tries to find the 'sea monster' that he saw when he almost drowned.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Emma is put in charge of managing the juice bar. Miriam decides to cause trouble and cuts the power to the cool room, then is unwittingly frozen by Emma who uses her powers to fix the freezer. Will the girls be able to thaw Miriam out?

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: A dolphin at Sea World will only eat from Cleo’s hand and when she has to sneak out to feed him, everyone thinks she has a boyfriend.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: A rainy day traps the girls inside. In an effort to play sick, the girls create a situation where their families become part of a dire medical emergency.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: The full moon has come again, and the girls are taking every precaution they can imagine this time. It proves to be in vain, however, when Rikki falls under the spell.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Cleo and Kim are fighting like crazy and Cleo is pushed to breaking point. Then cousin Angela comes to stay and things just get worse. Cleo realises there are more challenging things than an annoying sister.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Lewis enters the annual fishing derby. When Cleo sees him struggling, she decides to help him out with disastorous consequnces. Meanwhile, Rikki and Zane are trapped on a hotel balcony.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Zane thinks Miss Chatham holds the key to the sea monster. Emma needs a change so dyes her hair red. While Zane gets closer to the secret, he also gets closer to Rikki. Zane dives to Miss Chatham’s boat and sees a mermaid!

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Emma and Cleo find out Zane and Rikki are an item and force her to choose – him or them. When Zane appears to side with Harrison over the Mako island development Rikki’s decision is clear. Now it’s Zane’s turn to make a choice…

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: The girls discover a necklace for sale identical to Miss Chatham’s. Miriam causes a stir by buying it – then throwing it in the water. Rikki faces a choice whether to take the necklace and reveal her mermaidness to Zane.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Lewis thinks he’s found a way to control the girl’s mermaidness. The school dance brings all our heroines' 'boy issues' to the surface.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: The return of Dr. Denman means trouble for the girls. Meanwhile, Emma is having family dramas of her own. With Zane’s unwitting help, Denman’s research at Mako Island uncovers the girls' secret!

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Dr. Denman has discovered the girls' secret and trapped them on Mako Island. Their only chance to avoid being exposed is to use the lunar eclipse to give up their powers forever!

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Under the influence of a Full Moon, the girls' powers are hugely enhanced and they wreak havoc on Lewis in his boat. The next day the girls realise they still need Lewis.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: On this special edition of The Maury Show, Maury brings celebrity guests to the stage to share some of the most intense and shocking real-life footage ever caught on tape.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The lie detector results are in and the truth is coming out! These guests say their loved ones are cheating behind their backs. But who cheated? How many times? And can they handle the results? All will be revealed on today's explosive MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Sean and his girlfriend Lanika deny that he is the father of Rebecca's baby. Then, Kyrstal and Precious want to prove that their brother London did not father Paula's baby. Teen mom Alicia cheated on Tony, but doesn't know if he's the baby's father!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Adam is convinced that his wife Tara is cheating on him with a man named Chuck and doubts their child's paternity. Then, Victoria does not know if Josh W or Josh G fathered her baby!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Lianna and Devone have been married for a year, but she suspects Devone of being unfaithful because he stays out all night and is rarely home. Then, Kya is out on a $50,000 bond for allegedly abusing her newborn son, but did she do it?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Katie feels that the only way she can save her relationship with Lorenzo is by getting a DNA test to prove he's the father! Then, Tabatha and Derrick took a break. Amanda claims he fathered her newborn son, but Derrick says she is a liar and a stalker!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel made a decision that he regrets because he's about to lose his fiancee forever.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kassi is here because she can't believe that her ex-boyfriend left her for their roommate. Then it's a sister show down when these two go head to head for the love of the same man. Plus, Bryan's girlfriend Brandy is here to tell him a secret.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Regina tells her daughter, Angela, that she is getting married to her ex-boyfriend! Next Suzanne is tired of her boyfriend complaining about her job as an exotic entertainer. Then Tanya is here to tell Bryan's wife about their affair.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Steve caught wife Kristen with his brother. Tisha learns her man cheated with her friend. Drama!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Our guests today say their sinful sex secrets may cause broken hearts and family feuds.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Can Kim get rid of her husband's meddling ex-lover? Next Daron says he loves his girlfriend, Jessica, but has never fully ended his relationship with his ex, Sarah. Then Tammy wants her boyfriend, Dave, to stop sleeping with his old girlfriend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beba is here to confront her cousin for stealing her man. Next Tiffany thinks she is going to marry Brian today but there's a catch. Then Billie may have introduced her longtime love, Arkim, to Tiffanie, but today she wants him for herself.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has to reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Es Cortney el padre de los hijos de Brittany? Según su hermana, Brittany fue infiel con su prometido Clifton. Después, Melissa afirma que su ex-marido no es el padre de sus gemelos y que es Sean! ¿Lo confirmarán los resultados del ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Waldo se niega a ser el padre del bebé de Chelsea por su piel clara. Después, Kianna encontró fotos de mujeres desnudas en el teléfono de Nick y condones y colonia en su bolso de gimnasio. ¿Qué dirán los resultados del detector de mentiras de Maury?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Infieles, infieles y más infieles! El episodio de hoy de MAURY está lleno de drama, asombro y tentación. ¡Estos invitados simplemente no saben controlar sus acciones ante una tentación y se encuentran en un grave problema con sus parejas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Después de meses de rogar y suplicar, Latoya perdonó a Justice por su infidelidad. ¡Pero ahora han vuelto para someterlo a juicio por lo mismo! Después, puede que James sea demasiado bueno para ser verdad…

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En esta edición especial de The Maury Show, Maury invita a celebridades al escenario para compartir algunas de las imágenes reales más intensas e impactantes jamás grabadas.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury dice: "¡Tú SÍ eres el padre!" ¿Pero son esas las palabras que los presuntos padres nerviosos quieren oír? ¿O "Tú NO eres el padre" pondrá a las madres en shock? ¡Averigua los resultados en el MAURY de hoy!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kyle niega ser el padre del hijo de Citasia. Su mamá dice que él miente. Entonces, Josh tuvo cinco hijos. Dana dice que más vale que se prepare para el sexto porque ella dice que es el padre de su bebé.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Fidelia le pide perdón a Rosaura por no haberle dicho lo de la niña. Ella la perdona. Jacqueline le reclama a Silvano que se va a casar con Rosaura sin quererla.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Sonia le pide perdón a Rosaura. Guillermo aconseja a Silvano de que piense antes de casarse con Rosaura porque aparentemente esta enamorado de Jacqueline. Guillermo llega y ve a Luisana llorando.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot y Willy tienen otra de su discusiones, pues ella insiste en que cobre su herencia. Panchita y Santiago oyen la discusión con preocupación.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana llora al acordarse de Willy. Juliana y Ricky van con Hilario a ver al doctor de Luciano y lo engañan para sacarle la verdad sobre su salud. Natalia y Rosa se divierten bailando.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Hilario y Mariana intentan que Ricky no se dé cuenta de que su mamá y su abuela están borrachas, pero no lo logran. Mariana libera a Hilario y Ricky de toda culpa.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Para disgusto de Margot, Willy invita a Mariana y Martin a una cena para celebrar el cobro de la herencia y molestar a Gertrudis. Morgana inventa un encuentro con una amiga y Luciano le entrega las llaves de la caja fuerte.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Doña Cruz y Claudia alaban la belleza de Rosaura, infundiéndole así fuerzas para la difícil noche que se avecina al estar en presencia de sus enemigos.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la celebración del cumpleaños de Rafael, Eva se encarga de acrecentar los rumores de su entorno, al anunciar ante todos su supuesto embarazo de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la clínica, Luis Mario, sintiéndose deseoso de salir de dudas, conduce a Eva a que se haga un nuevo examen para comprobar si su embarazo es cierto.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana recibe la visita de Pedro después de llevarse una sorpresa al ver a Alejandro y su parecido con Maximiliano. Pancholón llama a Octavia y le pide dinero para liberar a Larry, a quien tiene secuestrado.

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.desc: Octavia sufre un desmayo de la impresión al conocer a Alejandro. Marfil enfrenta a Fiona al pelear por la atención de Alejandro.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack uncovers creatures that are experts at blending into their surroundings, like Cheetahs, Okapi, Leopards, Wagler's Pit Vipers, Geckos, and African Painted Dogs!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In a trio of stories from North Carolina, Jack takes a llama trek through the Great Smokey Mountains, learns about a unique veterinary program at the North Carolina Zoological Park, and checks out some of the state's endangered wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Big cats, gigantic spiders, killer reptiles, stealthy raptors… whether they pack poison, jaws or claws, all of today’s creatures are deadly in their own way.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Asia to visit the Singapore Zoo. Regarded as one of the top zoos in the world, this open-concept park is full of surprises for Jack and Sue, like orangutans swinging in the trees just feet above their heads

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Africa and the front lines of this growing threat to see what can be done to save the rhino from extinction. Jack meets the conservationists who are fighting back using every possible option.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Miniature Marvels
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some mini marvels of the animal world like, the mighty miniature donkeys, petite pygmy elephants, pint-sized Little penguins, high-flying hummingbirds, and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is eager to spot the animals on today’s countdown! Cheetah, painted dog, giraffe, a baby tapir and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: On this adventure, Jack takes you on whirlwind trip, from his home at the Columbus Zoo, to some of his favorite destinations in Africa, Australia and Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack accompanies four Florida manatees on a long distance flight from Sea World, Orlando to the Columbus Zoo in Ohio.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living on Land & Sea
programme.desc: Today, species that split their time between dry land and water. From alligators in the Florida Everglades, to elephants in a river in Borneo, and a surprising species that makes its home on a waterfall!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In Costa Rica, Jack becomes enthralled with the country's beautiful butterflies, including the Blue Morpho, the “Queen of the Rainforest.”

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he searches for the greatest ape species, like Gorillas, Orangutans, Chimpanzees, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some superb simians, each with their own unique adaptations. Proboscis Monkeys, Spider Monkeys, Macaques, Mandrills, Langurs, and lots more magnificent monkeys!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wickedly Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along if you dare as Jungle Jack is counting down hair-raising true stories from the sea, land and air! Face-to-face encounters with bats, caiman, snakes, plus real dragons, on this Wickedly Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: National Treasures
programme.desc: America's National Parks and Preserves are much more than vacation spots...they're national treasures! Come along with Jack as he hits the trail in search of the rare and amazing animals that call these pristine places home.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of Africa's best national parks, like the world-famous Serengeti, Botswana's Chobe National Park, and Lope National Park in Gabon. Forest elephants, Leopards, Hippos, Crocs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In the south of Israel, the Hannas look at saving wildlife in the desert. Jack visits an ornithologist restoring a natural habitat in order to maintain an important fly-way for migratory birds.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into South Africa's Zululand and Hluhluwe-iMfolozi Park – the oldest nature reserve in Africa, where he encounters Baboons, Elephant, Rhino and more, all after witnessing the birth of a baby at the Zulu Nyala Game Reserve.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet impressive and iconic species, each representing their home continent, like Asian King Cobras, Australian Kangaroos, African Lions, Antarctica’s Penguins, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they trek deep into the jungles of Rwanda and get a close-up look at wild, and extremely endangered, mountain gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and the gang to Tasmania where they're checking out some of the most unique animals on the planet at Trowunna Wildlife Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack joins the conservationists racing to save incredible species from extinction. Sea Turtles, Giraffe, Painted Dogs, Cheetahs, Whooping Cranes, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: In South Africa, Jack and his daughter Kathleen undergo ranger training at the Sabi Sabi Game Reserve, they learn to track elephants to a water hole and encounter lions, cheetahs, and leopards.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dirty Half-Dozen
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of the earthiest creatures in the world. Mud-loving elephants, nesting gators, burrowing penguins, sand-dwelling bee-eaters and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Smarts
programme.desc: Today’s animals are headed to the top of the class! Jungle Jack counts down some of nature’s most clever creatures, like dolphins, chimpanzees, elephants and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Just outside the city of Santiago, Chile there are people working to conserve and protect their native wildlife. Join Jack as he meets up with a family who started out taking in abandoned pets and ended up running a rehab center for rescued primates.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the Sao Paulo Zoo, where a small cat-breeding program aims to save many of Brazil's endangered wildcats including the Margay, Oncilla and Pampas Cat.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They know as much about crime as any crime fighter, or any criminal. They're the crime writers, and through their eyes we see murder most foul.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack – whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons – the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark attempt to reform a con-man.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas unmasks a killer posing as a door-to-door seed salesman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance run into trouble while transporting a captured killer back to face trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A deathbed request from an old friend sends Lucas to a neighboring town in search of the man's long-lost sweetheart.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas thinks he has seen a ghost when a young man, eerily similar to a man he killed in the Civil War, challenges him to a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas agrees to take a job as an undercover agent and goes to investigate rumors of the sales of arms to renegade Indians. His life is endangered by the town drunk who stumbles onto his true identity.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas is in Wyoming on the trail of a gang illegally selling weapons to the Indians, Mark stays with Miss Milly, where he suffers from loneliness and doubt with his father gone for 2 months.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas looks for answers when recovering alcoholic Micah Torrence returns to the bottle and turns in his badge.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: A deranged ex-prisoner of war, cruelly abused in a Northern army prison, captures Lucas, locks him in a cage and vows to make him suffer for his part in the Civil War.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A traveling salesman can't talk his way out of an assault charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A janitor-turned-gunfighter's reputation hangs on one lucky shot and a lot of gall. The handyman finds himself in trouble when he accidentally kills another gunfighter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to get help when he is shot after witnessing a murder.

programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Best of Muhammad Ali
programme.desc: All the best fight moments of "The Greatest" Muhammad Ali.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Thomas Hearns
programme.desc: On September 16th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Thomas Hearns for the WBA and WBC World welterweight titles at the Caesars Palace in Las Vegas resulting in a win by technical knockout for Leonard and went on to be the 1981 Fight of the year.

programme.title: James Toney vs Charles Williams
programme.desc: On July 29th, 1994 James Toney and Charles Williams battled eachother for IBF World Super Middleweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a knockout victory for James Toney.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Davey Moore
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1983 Roberto Duran fought Davey Moore for the WBA World Super welterweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York Moore was knocked down in the 7th round giving the win to Duran.

programme.title: Micky Ward vs Alfonso Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997 Micky Ward and Alfonso Sanchez faced eachother at the Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas the 10 round bout ended after seven giving Ward the victory by technical knockout.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Cleveland Williams
programme.desc: On November 14th, 1966 Muhammad Ali faced Cleveland Williams at the Astrodome in Houston, TX. They fought for WBC World Heavyweight titles in what was supposed to be a 15 round bout only went 3 resulting in a win for Ali.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs George Foreman
programme.desc: On April 19th, 1991, Evander Holyfield fought George Foreman for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Heavyweight Titles in Atlantic City. Both fighters displayed incredible skill and resilience, but Holyfield ultimately emerged victorious after 12 rounds.

programme.title: Marvin Hagler vs John Mugabi
programme.desc: On March 10th, 1986 Marvin Hagler and John Mugabi fought at the Caesars Palace Outdoor Arena in Las Vegas for IBF, WBA and WBC world middleweight titles while Mugabi was ranked number 1 by all three bodies the fight ended in a victory for Hagler.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Ayub Kalule
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1981 Sugar Ray Leonard faced Ayub Kalule for the WBA World Super Welterweight title at the Astrodome in Houston that ended by technical knockout in the ninth round giving Leonard the win.

programme.title: James Toney vs Tim Littles
programme.desc: On March 5th, 1994 James Toney and Tim Littles fought at the Olympic Auditorium in Los Angeles for IBF World Super middleweight titles resulting in a technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ivan Robinson
programme.desc: On May 28th, 2005 Julio Cesar Chavez and Ivan Robinson faced eachother at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in an unamimous decision victory for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs Larry Holmes
programme.desc: On June 19th, 1992 Evander Holyfield battles Larry Holmes for the IBF, WBA, and WBC World Heavyweight title they battled at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas the bout went a full twelve rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Holyfield.

programme.title: Hector Camacho vs Sugar Ray Leonard
programme.desc: On January 3rd, 1997 Hector Camacho faced Sugar Ray Leonard at the Convention Center in Atlantic City battling for IBC Middleweight title the bout ended after five rounds resulting in a victory for Leonard by technical knockout.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Attempting to even the odds against the Stunticons, the Autobots create the Aerialbots to join in the battle against Megatron, who plans to use Vector Sigma to turn the Earth into a metal planet like Cybertron!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan involving the thefts of some high-profile materials.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car—a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car - a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Fixit, craving the action of a field assignment, gets more than he bargained for when the Bee Team tries to keep wily Combiner CHOP SHOP from fleeing Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Beleaguered Bumblebee must learn to lead in his own way as the team struggles to bring in the brutish Buffaloid. Human scientists discovered TERRASHOCK, the stasis capsule.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Sideswipe’s loyalty and dedication to the team come into question as he and Bumblebee track down Thunderhoof a Decepticon taking advantage of human folklore.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bee and his team track FILCH, a crow-like Decepticon with an impulsive urge to steal all things “shiny,” who has taken Denny prisoner.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Grimlock seems to turn against his friends, but the change of heart proves to have been caused by a miniature Decepticon taking control of his body and mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Strongarm takes on her first “solo” mission—tracking the insane frog-like Decepticon SPRINGLOAD to the ruins of an ancient temple.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Bee Team welcomes visiting Autobot veteran JAZZ, just in time to fend off the massive Bot-worm PED – a petty crook bent on monopolizing Energon supplies.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After his accidental transportation to Cybertron, Megatron returns- and he wants to get his hands on an anti-matter formula created on Earth that could mean limitless power for the Decepticons! Bumblebee and Spike race to warn the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one—the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one - the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Inspired by dinosaur skeletons, Ratchet and Wheeljack create Grimlock, Slag, and Sludge, the Dinobots! When Autobot forces are captured by the Decepticons, it may be up to the Dinobots to save the day.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Optimus Prime assigns the Dinobots to guard a meteorite that contains new and unknown energy. Appealing to Grimlocks' simple arrogance, Megatron convinces the Dinobots to attack Optimus Prime and betray the Autobots.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 3. With help from a human scientist, the Decepticons enslave people through mind control to fight against the Autobots and generate enough power for Megatron's sinister plan: bringing Cybertron into Earth's orbit to steal all of its energy.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Deep in the “Demon Swamp” on the island of Bali, large robotic insects are eating everything in their path and terrorizing the islanders. Megatron realizes they are an ancient breed of Decepticons, and forms an alliance with these powerful Insecticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As Optimus Prime and Megatron prepare to face off in a duel, Megatron secretly plots to unleash the latest addition to his Decepticon army—the Constructicons – along with Devastator, a Decepticon unlike any the Autobots have ever seen before!

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals discover a new Beast Mode Maximal – a bat named Nightscream – and a mysterious fruit tree, neither of which should exist on the machine world of Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Rattrap finally learns how to Transform, only to discover his Robot Mode has no weapons. With nowhere else to turn for protection, he strikes a deal with Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals discover a junkyard facility where the robot shells of the missing Transformers are stored. Meanwhile, Blackarachnia is utterly convinced that Thrust's spark is Silverbolt's.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Cheetor leads a dangerous mission to try to bring out Tankor's old Maximal personality. In doing so, Rattrap discovers a major clue to the Maximal's missing memories and discovers that Tankor has Rhinox's spark. Jetstorm removes Blackarachnia's spark.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Nightscream fights to retrieve Blackarachnia's stolen Spark. Meanwhile, Optimus is able to contact Rhinox's Spark, but Rhinox deals him a major surprise.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Megatron sends his Generals and Diagnostic Drone into the catacombs to kidnap Nightscream and learn the secret behind his Beast Mode. Nightscream is forced to relive a painful memory from his past.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Tankor uncovers an ancient weapon with the power to turn organic material into cybernetic metal. Nightscream gets hit by the weapon and the Maximals race against time to save him from going off-line.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Rattrap uncovers a catalyst program that speeds up the growth of Cybertron's newfound plant life. Meanwhile, Blackarachnia discovers that Thrust's spark is actually Waspinator's and that Jetstorm's spark is Silverbolt's.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones must defeat Penelope Pink in the Main Event to secure a championship match vs The Beast. Over at Lana Star's Fab Four mansion, Big Rig Betty's tired of working for Lana Star, but is surprised to learn that Holly doesn't seem to mind it.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones is ready to talk and shares compelling evidence with David McLane about the attack on The Beast in an effort to claim the $10,000 reward money. In the ring, The Mighty Mights face Miami's Sweet Heat for the WOW Tag Team Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In the main event, The Classmaster faces Santana Garrett in order to fulfill the stipulation ladi forth by Matchmaker David McLane - a victory will earn her a chance to challenge The Beast for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Big Rig Betty and Jessie Jones versus Miami Sweet Heat's Lindsey and Laurie Carlson in the main event to determine who retains the alliance of Holly Swag. New Superhero Xena Phoenix makes her WOW debut against Scout Parker.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four is fabber than ever, with the addition of Holly Swag. Holly's determined to put her best foot forward with her new crew in her first match in the Foursome against Ashley Blaze. Valentina Diamante debuts for WOW against Coach Campanelli.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Samantha Smart and The Classmaster to collect on the deal they made with Matchmaker David McLane for the main event with a WOW World Championship match against The Beast.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW roster is reeling from last week's news and the videotape delivered from The Beast when Matchmaker David McLane announces a 12-Woman Battle Royale to crown a new champion.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: New tag team champions Big Rig Betty and Jessie Jones celebrate their title reign to kick off an episode full of qualifying matches for the upcoming over-the-top-rope Battle Royal for the WOW World Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW Battle Royal for the World Championship approaches as the Superheroes continue to vie to qualify, including Genesis, who faces new Superhero Ashley Blaze. Meanwhile, Xena Phoenix looks forward to continuing her strong start in WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Backed by Alliance members Adriana Gambino, BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni, Reina Del Rey is on a mission to expand the Alliance's hold over WOW with a victory over Foxxy Fierce - and she's vowed to take no prisoners on the roster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On the heels of their victory last week, Miami Sweet Heat demands a rematch for the WOW Tag Team Championships as other Superheroes continue to focus on qualifying for the upcoming Battle Royal.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Miami Sweet Heat's Lindsey and Laurie Carlson and Animal Instinct's Goldie Collins and Katarina Jinx both called "next" on the WOW Tag Team Championships last week, the main event sees a triple confrontation with both teams.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The qualifying matches are over, and twelve competitors are finally ready to compete in the over-the-top-rope Battle Royal for the WOW World Championship vacated by The Beast. Who will be the last woman standing and NEW WOW World Champion?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's the beginning of a new reign in WOW as new WOW World Champion The Classmaster, accompanied by the IQ Superior Samantha Smart, celebrates The Classmaster victory in last week's Championship Battle Royal.
